name: Kathy Smith's Rich Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Grease the bottom of an 8-1/2x11 springform pan with margarine.
3. Sprinkle chocolate wafer crumbs into the pan. Set aside.
4. In a processor, combine cream cheese, sugar, cottage cheese, cocoa, flour, extracts and salt; process until smooth.
5. Add egg substitute and process just until blended.
6. Slowly pour mixture over crumbs in pan.
7. Place a small pan of boiling water in the corner of the oven (this helps prevent the cheesecake from cracking on top).
8. Bake for 65-75 minutes or until cheesecake is set.
9. Cool in pan on wire rack.
10. Cover and chill at least 8 hours.
11. Remove sides of pan and transfer cake to a serving platter.
12. Garnish with berries, if desired.
